pr.title: fix: accept verifier reward output when script exits nonzero (ENG-150)
pr.body: ## Summary Fixes ENG-150: SkillsBench verifiers exiting nonzero after reward 0 were reported as `verifier_errored` instead of honest model failures (`failed`). **Root cause:** `verifier.py` line 270-277 raised `VerifierOutputParseError` whenever a verifier script exited nonzero AND a reward file existed. This was intended to prevent accepting "stale" reward output from a crashed verifier — but `_clear_reward_outputs()` already wipes stale files before each run, so any reward file present was written by the current invocation. **The fix:** Replace the blanket rejection with a warning log. The reward is accepted and the result is classified by the scoring layer as `"failed"` (reward=0) or `"passed"` (reward=1.0) instead of `"verifier_errored"`. **Before:** `dynamic-object-aware-egomotion`, `threejs-structure-parser`, `threejs-to-obj` → `verifier_errored` (infrastructure noise) **After:** Same tasks → `failed` (honest model failure signal) **Changes:** - `src/benchflow/task/verifier.py`: Replace `VerifierOutputParseError` raise with `logger.warning` when `rc!=0` + reward file present - `tests/test_oracle_chokepoint.py`: Add 5 ENG-150 guard tests (scoring classification, reward.txt acceptance, reward.json acceptance, e2e pipeline, invariant for no-reward-file case) - `tests/test_llm_judge_verifier.py`: Delete pre-ENG-150 test per AGENTS.md convention (new behavior covered by chokepoint tests) **Test results:** 1861 passed, 9 skipped, 0 failed. ruff + ty clean. **Real eval:** gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview on Daytona, `--include hello-world-task`, reward=1.0, all artifacts verified (result.json, trajectory/9 entries, summary.json, reward.txt). ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] **Verify reward freshness guarantee**: Confirm that `_clear_reward_outputs()` at line 147 of `verifier.py` wipes both `reward.txt` and `reward.json` before every verifier run — this is the safety invariant that makes accepting reward-from-nonzero-exit safe - [ ] **Run SkillsBench tasks that previously showed `verifier_errored`**: Rerun `dynamic-object-aware-egomotion`, `threejs-structure-parser`, or `threejs-to-obj` and confirm they now classify as `failed` with reward=0 instead of `verifier_errored` - [ ] **Check for false passes**: Verify that a genuinely crashed verifier (no reward file written) still raises `RewardFileNotFoundError` and gets classified as `verifier_errored` ### Notes The scoring precedence in `_utils/scoring.py` is unchanged — reward still takes precedence over errors (lines 123-128). The fix only changes the verifier layer to stop discarding valid reward output. Devin Review feedback addressed: deleted the pre-ENG-150 test entirely instead of rewriting it in-place, per AGENTS.md convention. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d30db77671094a719a2d951dde637750 Requested by: @xdotli ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
